content.text:
## Input

```json
{
  "findings": "Here's a summary of the `src/` directory:

## Structure

12 source files + 7 test files, forming the **pi-workflows** extension ‚Äî a workflow orchestration system for the Pi coding agent.

## Core Modules

### `types.ts` ‚Äî Shared Interfaces
All type definitions: `WorkflowSpec`, `StepSpec`, `AgentSpec`, `ExecutionState`, `StepResult`, `StepUsage`, `WorkflowResult`, `CompletionSpec`, `ExpressionScope`, `CompletionScope`.

### `index.ts` ‚Äî Extension Entry Point
- Registers a `workflow` **tool** (callable by LLM) and `/workflow` **command** (user slash-command)
- `parseAgentFrontmatter()` ‚Äî reads `.md` agent files with YAML frontmatter
- `createAgentLoader()` ‚Äî searches `.pi/agents/` (project) then `~/.pi/agent/agents/` (user) for agent specs
- Tool `execute()` dispatches to `executeWorkflow()` and returns results
- Command supports subcommands: `list`, `run <name> [--input '<json>']`, `status`

### `workflow-executor.ts` ‚Äî Orchestration Loop
The main engine:
1. Validates input against workflow input schema
2. Creates run directory (`initRunDir`)
3. Shows TUI progress widget
4. Iterates steps sequentially, for each: resolves `${{ }}` expressions ‚Üí loads agent spec ‚Üí builds prompt ‚Üí dispatches subprocess ‚Üí validates output against schema ‚Üí persists state
5. Supports abort via `AbortSignal`
6. Fail-fast on step failure
7. Injects result into conversation via `pi.sendMessage()`

### `dispatch.ts` ‚Äî Subprocess Spawning
- Spawns `pi --mode json` as child process per step
- Builds CLI args from `StepSpec` + `AgentSpec` (model, tools, extensions, skills, system prompt)
- Long prompts (>8000 chars) written to temp files (`@<file>`)
- Streams stdout as newline-delimited JSON events
- Collects usage metrics (tokens, cost, turns), last assistant text
- Cleanup of temp files, cancellation support via SIGTERM/SIGKILL

### `expression.ts` ‚Äî `${{ }}` Expression Engine
- Property-path resolution: `${{ steps.diagnose.output.rootCause }}`
- **Pipe filters**: `${{ totalDurationMs | duration }}`, `| currency`, `| json`
- Type-preserving resolution: whole-value `${{ expr }}` returns original type; embedded interpolates as string
- Recursive resolution through objects/arrays
- Detailed error diagnostics (step status, traversal path)

### `workflow-spec.ts` ‚Äî YAML Parser
- Parses `.workflow.yaml` files into `WorkflowSpec`
- Validates required fields (`name`, `steps`, each step needs `agent`)
- Handles optional: `input`/`output` schemas, `model`, `when`, `timeout`, `loop`, `gate`, `transform`, `completion`
- Completion spec validation: `template` XOR `message`, optional `include`

### `workflow-discovery.ts` ‚Äî Filesystem Scanner
- Scans `.pi/workflows/` (project) and `~/.pi/agent/workflows/` (user)
- Matches `*.workflow.yaml` files, non-recursive
- Project-level shadows user-level specs with same name
- Graceful skip on parse failures

### `schema-validator.ts` ‚Äî AJV Wrapper
- `validate()` ‚Äî validates data against inline JSON Schema
- `validateFromFile()` ‚Äî loads schema from file path, then validates
- Throws `ValidationError` with formatted AJV error details

### `state.ts` ‚Äî Run State Persistence
- `generateRunId()` ‚Äî format: `<name>-<yyyymmdd>-<hhmmss>-<4hex>`
- `initRunDir()` ‚Äî creates `.pi/workflow-runs/<runId>/` with `sessions/` and `outputs/`
- Atomic state writes (tmp + rename)
- `buildResult()` ‚Äî aggregates usage, picks last completed step's output
- `formatResult()` ‚Äî human-readable summary with checkmarks, durations, costs

### `tui.ts` ‚Äî Progress Widget
- Renders live progress in Pi's TUI with pulsing indicator (800ms interval)
- Shows: workflow name, step N/M, elapsed time
- Per-step status: ‚úì completed (with duration/cost), ‚ñ∏ running, ‚úó failed, ¬∑ pending

### `format.ts` ‚Äî Display Utilities
- `formatDuration()` ‚Äî ms ‚Üí `42s` / `1m32s` / `1h02m`
- `formatCost()` ‚Äî number ‚Üí `$0.03`

### `completion.ts` ‚Äî Post-Workflow Message Builder
- Resolves `CompletionSpec` into final message for the main LLM conversation
- Two modes: **template** (full `${{ }}` template) or **message + include** (message text + structured data attachments)
- Uses `CompletionScope` with full result metadata (usage, duration, runDir, etc.)

## Data Flow

```
.workflow.yaml ‚Üí parseWorkflowSpec ‚Üí executeWorkflow
                                       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ validate input (AJV)
                                       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ for each step:
                                       ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ resolveExpressions (${{ }})
                                       ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ loadAgent (.md frontmatter)
                                       ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ dispatch (pi --mode json subprocess)
                                       ‚îÇ   ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ validate output (AJV, optional)
                                       ‚îÇ   ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ writeState (atomic)
                                       ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ resolveCompletion
                                       ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ pi.sendMessage (inject result)
```"
}
```

content.thinking: Summarize the findings about the src/ directory of pi-workflows.

content.text:
## pi-workflows `src/` Directory Summary

The `src/` directory contains **12 source files + 7 test files** implementing a workflow orchestration extension for the Pi coding agent.

### Architecture

The system executes multi-step workflows defined in `.workflow.yaml` files, where each step spawns a separate `pi --mode json` subprocess with its own context window. Data flows between steps via `${{ }}` expressions.

### Key Modules

| Module | Role |
|---|---|
| **`index.ts`** | Extension entry point ‚Äî registers `workflow` tool (LLM-callable) and `/workflow` command (slash-command with `list`, `run`, `status` subcommands). Loads agent specs from `.pi/agents/` directories. |
| **`workflow-executor.ts`** | Main orchestration loop ‚Äî validates input, iterates steps sequentially, resolves expressions, dispatches subprocesses, validates output, persists state. Supports abort and fail-fast. |
| **`dispatch.ts`** | Spawns `pi --mode json` child processes per step. Streams NDJSON events, collects usage metrics. Long prompts use temp files. Cleanup via SIGTERM/SIGKILL. |
| **`expression.ts`** | `${{ }}` expression engine with property-path resolution, pipe filters (`duration`, `currency`, `json`), and type-preserving semantics. |
| **`workflow-spec.ts`** | YAML parser for `.workflow.yaml` ‚Üí `WorkflowSpec`. Validates structure and handles optional fields (schemas, `when`, `timeout`, `loop`, `gate`, `completion`). |
| **`workflow-discovery.ts`** | Scans project (`.pi/workflows/`) and user (`~/.pi/agent/workflows/`) directories. Project-level shadows user-level on name collision. |
| **`schema-validator.ts`** | AJV wrapper for JSON Schema validation of step inputs/outputs. |
| **`state.ts`** | Run state persistence under `.pi/workflow-runs/<runId>/` with atomic writes (tmp + rename). Generates run IDs, aggregates usage, formats results. |
| **`tui.ts`** | Live TUI progress widget showing step status (‚úì/‚ñ∏/‚úó/¬∑), elapsed time, and cost. |
| **`completion.ts`** | Builds the post-workflow message injected back into the main conversation via `pi.sendMessage()`. Supports template or message+include modes. |
| **`types.ts`** | All shared type definitions. |
| **`format.ts`** | Duration and cost formatting utilities. |

### Data Flow

```
.workflow.yaml ‚Üí parse ‚Üí executeWorkflow
                           ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ validate input (AJV)
                           ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ for each step: resolve expressions ‚Üí load agent ‚Üí dispatch subprocess ‚Üí validate output ‚Üí persist state
                           ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ resolve completion message
                           ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ inject result into main conversation
```
